message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
    ArrowColor gray
    ActorBorderColor black
    ActorBackgroundColor white
    ParticipantBorderColor black
    ParticipantBackgroundColor white
}

actor Admin as admin
participant "Sqoop" as sqoop
database "Metastore DB" as metastore
rectangle "HDFS" as hdfs
boundary "Hive SQL" as hive_sql
database "Hive" as hive
circle "Hive Table" as hive_table
circle "Ambari" as ambari

== Pre Upgrade Planning Setup ==
admin -> sqoop : Run "Collect the Metadata"
sqoop -> metastore : Extracts from
sqoop -> hdfs : Saves to
admin -> hive : Run "Build Supporting Tables"

== Pre Upgrade Planning ==
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Distinct Serdes"
admin -> hive_table : Fix Tables with Serde Issues
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Check Partition Location"
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Non-Managed Table Locations"
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Managed Table Locations"
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Missing HDFS Directories Check"
admin -> hive_sql : Correct "Missing Directories"
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Table Migration Check"
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Acid Table Conversions"
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Conversion Table Directories"

== Pre Upgrade Compaction ==
note left of admin: This process should be run several days BEFORE the actual upgrade to reduce the downtime of the upgrade.\nAnd should be run just BEFORE the upgrade and AFTER all users have been cleared from the system to ensure no tables are modified after this runs.
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Acid Table Compaction Check"
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Acid Table Compaction Required"
admin -> hive : TUNE THE COMPACTOR for estimated compaction needs
admin -> hive_sql : Run the compaction script. Break it apart if needed.

== Post Upgrade Planning ==
admin -> hive_sql : Run "Acid Table Locations". Save artifact for Upgrade.

== Upgrade ==
admin -> admin : Review and Run ALL previous steps and collect details.
admin -> admin : Decision to intervene with Ambari Process based on volumes indicated through research
admin -> ambari : Hack Pre/Post Processes
admin -> admin : Run Compaction Routine one last time.
admin -> ambari : Start Upgrade
admin -> admin : Run the Post Upgrade Planning Output to convert tables.
admin -> ambari : Complete Upgrade

@enduml
```
